evidence_summary: ABC Listen's 2024 item Unexplained stories from the Old Adelaide Gaol says places where bad things happened can retain unsettling energy. It says Gary Joyce from National Parks and Wildlife Service SA shared stories from the Old Adelaide Gaol of a dropping plate and an invisible man with Deb Tribe.

title: tortured spirit in Black Rock House tortured spirit legend
publication_or_organisation: Modern institutional place-linked ghost records; ABC / State Library Victoria
australian_relation: Modern Australian public media and state-library pages with substantive place-linked ghost or haunted-site evidence.
coordinate_evidence_note: State Library Victoria page names Black Rock House and the Black Rock locality; exact house coordinates did not verify in Nominatim, so the representative flag uses the state-checked Black Rock locality result.
evidence_summary: State Library Victoria's Black Rock House article says the house was once known as the Haunted Castle. The page reports that school girls in 1910 asked to visit the Haunted Castle because they believed it was haunted by the tortured spirit of its previous mistress, and says modern visitors can still attend ghost tours at Black Rock House.
